title: [AUDIT] Fix Data Parity and Missing Market Snapshots
description:
The Audit Agent has identified critical issues in main.py and ai_analyzer.py. See bug.md for details.

1. Stale market context in AI trade log (main.py: _send_signal uses dashboard_state instead of current cycle data).
2. Missing Phase 1.5 Market Snapshots implementation.
3. Missing log_market_snapshot and evaluate_snapshots methods in ai_analyzer.py.
